privileged_info_summary: The task processes a Tier II chemical inventory XML file (epcra_tier2_data.xml) containing data for Green Valley Water Facility in Colchester, Vermont. The file includes inventory records for two real chemicals: Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) and Fluorosilic Acid (CAS 16961-83-4) using the CAMEO NOAA data standard (namespace: https://cameo.noaa.gov/epcra_tier2/data_standard/v1, version 1.0.0). The dataset reports year 2019. The data is synthetic, created for testing purposes with fictional facility details and phone numbers, though the XML schema, chemical data, and hazard classifications follow real standards.
